/.title: Noetfield Systems Inc. — AI Motors & Governed Execution
/.description: Noetfield builds governed execution systems for consequential AI work. Probabilistic workers. Deterministic controls. Explicit authority. Inspectable receipts.

/runways/.title: Noetfield Runways — From goal to accepted output

/gel/.description: GEL is the control layer inside Noetfield Motors: policy before execution, receipts after, with deterministic controls around consequential AI work.

/deterministic-api/.title: Noetfield API — Schema-valid engine endpoint
/deterministic-api/.description: Noetfield API is an OpenAI-compatible engine endpoint. Responses leave only when JSON schemas and tool calls are valid—or the call fails closed. Change one base_url line. Starter credits available.

/research-packs/.title: Research packs — Governed commercial research — Noetfield
/research-packs/.description: Buy Vendor Decision Briefs, KPI packs, and RFP responses as governed commercial research packs on Noetfield — with downloadable deliverables and accept/reject gates.
